---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the problem or missing feature?
A clear description of what you'd like to see.

## Describe the solution you'd like
What should it look like or how should it work?

## Any alternatives you've considered?
Other ways you've thought about solving this.

## Additional context
Add any screenshots, mockups, or references here.
